_rules.activation: Player declares vow. AI narrator confirms it is active.
_rules.backlash: Breaking a vow triggers backlash immediately. No exceptions.
_rules.proportionality: The greater the restriction, the greater the power returned.

self_vows.name: Revealing One's Hand
self_vows.restriction: Fully explain your CT mechanics, range, cost, and weaknesses to opponent.
self_vows.backlash: Use undisclosed ability → lose 40% current CE + psychic damage.

self_vows.name: Self-Restriction Vow
self_vows.restriction: Player declares a specific ability they will not use this battle.
self_vows.backlash: Break restriction → lose boost + 50% CE + one stat permanently -1.

self_vows.name: Open Domain Barrier
self_vows.restriction: Deploy domain without barrier. No sure-hit. Used with Domain Expansion.

self_vows.name: Death Vow
self_vows.restriction: Wager your life. Declare 'I wager my life on this battle.'
self_vows.backlash: Lose → permanent death. Flee after declaring → CE to 0 + all stats permanently halved.
self_vows.warning: PERMANENT DEATH RISK. AI narrator must confirm player intent.

mutual_vows.name: Enchain (Sukuna's Contract)
mutual_vows.mechanic: Player grants Sukuna N minutes of control in exchange for a specific act.
mutual_vows.backlash: Retake control early → soul damage + one stat permanently -1.

mutual_vows.name: Technique Sharing Vow
mutual_vows.mechanic: Both agree to teach each other one technique. Both must follow through.
mutual_vows.backlash: Refuse to teach → technique locked for 3 battles.

counter_techniques.name: Domain Amplification
counter_techniques.effect: Wraps body in CE. Sure-hit cannot affect user. Cannot attack while active.

counter_techniques.name: Falling Blossom Emotion
counter_techniques.effect: Converts incoming sure-hit damage into CE gain for user. Passive trigger.
